taxonomy: Passiflora brachystephanea is a species of passionflower native to Brazil. It belongs to the Passifloraceae family, a family of flowering plants commonly known as the passionflower or granadilla family. The species is classified as a member of the genus Passiflora, which comprises over 550 species of passionflowers. The classification of Passiflora brachystephanea is essential for understanding its evolutionary relationships and ecological role in its native habitat.
